scripts.build:sidecar: node -e "const {copyFileSync,mkdirSync,rmSync}=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const triples={'win32:x64':'x86_64-pc-windows-msvc','win32:arm64':'aarch64-pc-windows-msvc','darwin:x64':'x86_64-apple-darwin','darwin:arm64':'aarch64-apple-darwin','linux:x64':'x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu','linux:arm64':'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'};const key=process.platform+':'+process.arch;const triple=triples[key];if(!triple) throw new Error('unsupported target triple for '+key);const ext=process.platform==='win32'?'.exe':'';const source=process.env.BUN_INSTALL_BIN||path.join(process.env.USERPROFILE||'','.bun','bin','bun'+ext);const target=path.join('src-tauri','binaries','bun-'+triple+ext);mkdirSync(path.dirname(target),{recursive:true});rmSync(target,{force:true});copyFileSync(source,target);"
